Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, jurisdiction_01, product_20, product_15], list every jurisdiction2 value X such that operates_in(sector=sector_03, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_20, jurisdiction2=?X) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"jurisdiction2","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b01_operates_in","args":{"jurisdiction":{"const":"jurisdiction_20"},"jurisdiction2":{"var":"X"},"sector":{"const":"sector_03"}}}}
